entry.title: New: Bill 70 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2025 BUDGET FOR THE COUNTY OF MAUI, CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT, DEPARTMENT OF WATER SUPPLY; AND APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF MANAGEMENT, DEPARTMENT OF WATER SUPPLY, FIRE FLOW IMPROVEMENTS TO WATER SYSTEM"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
